channel.title: Rust on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Rust on Memo

item.title: Install Rust
item.description: Install Rust # Install # Use rustup to install and version control rust. After installing rustup, add $HOME/.cargo/bin to your PATH. Arch sudo pacman -S rustup Otherwise curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh rustup # To update rustc and other programs using rustup, run rustup update. rustup update If you want to update rustup itself, you can update it with the package manager of your distribution or run rustup self update.

item.title: Inline Assembly
item.description: Inline Assembly in Rust # llvm_asm!() # Sample code: #![feature(llvm_asm)] fn main() { let i: u64 = 3; let j: u64 = 5; let o: u64; unsafe { llvm_asm!("mov $1, $0; add $2, $0;" : "=r"(o) : "{bx}"(i), "{cx}"(j)); } println!("{}", o); } Output: % rustup run nightly cargo run Compiling asm_test v0.1.0 (/home/mori/playground/rust/asm_test) Finished dev [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 0.

item.title: System Call
item.description: System Call # Use system-call crate # Add a dependency to Cargo.toml: [dependencies] system-call="0.1.3" Sample code: #[macro_use] extern crate syscall; fn main() { let mut pid; let cpid; let mut val = 0; unsafe { pid = syscall!(GETPID); } println!("before: val is {}, pid is {}", val, pid); unsafe { cpid = syscall!(FORK); } if cpid < 0 { println!
